auth.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth.registerSubtitle: Property owners — start managing your Costa Tropical investment.
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your owner portal
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.

welcome.title: Welcome to HostMasters
welcome.desc: Let us show you everything your owner portal can do. This quick tour will walk you through all the tools available to manage and monitor your property from anywhere in the world.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Your home screen shows everything at a glance: this month's earnings, occupancy rate, your next guest, and the condition of your property. Updated in real time.

earnings.title: Earnings & Payouts
earnings.desc: Track every euro. See your gross income, our commission, cleaning fees, maintenance costs, and your net payout. Everything itemized, nothing hidden.

bookings.title: Bookings & Calendar
bookings.desc: See every reservation across Airbnb, Booking.com, and direct bookings. Know who's coming, when, and how much each stay generates. Block dates for personal use anytime.

care.title: Care & Maintenance
care.desc: Your property is inspected after every checkout. Track cleanings, preventive maintenance, and any issues — all with photos and reports. Request a visit anytime.

communication.title: Direct Communication
communication.desc: Message your property manager directly through the platform. No lost emails, no phone tag. Everything documented and searchable. Your AI assistant is also available 24/7.

ai.title: AI-Powered Tools
ai.desc: HostMasters uses artificial intelligence to maximize your revenue. Dynamic pricing adjusts your nightly rate based on 7 market factors. Our AI monitor checks your property daily for anomalies.
features: 24/7 AI assistant with your real data

reports.title: Reports & Documents
reports.desc: Download detailed monthly statements as PDF in your preferred language. Annual summaries, tax-ready reports, and full transparency on every transaction.
features: Reports in EN, PT, ES, DE

plan.title: Your Plan
plan.desc: You can view and upgrade your subscription plan at any time. Higher plans unlock lower commissions, AI pricing, smart lock integration, and priority support.
features: AI features on Mid and Premium

profile.title: Let's set up your profile
profile.desc: Just a few details so we can personalize your experience.

done.title: You're all set!
done.desc: Your portal is ready. Explore your dashboard, check your earnings, and contact your manager anytime. Welcome to HostMasters.

sidebar.title: Your Navigation
sidebar.desc: This sidebar gives you quick access to every section: dashboard, earnings, bookings, property care, your plan, and direct communication with your manager.

guest.title: Your Next Guest
guest.desc: See who is arriving next — with nationality flag, dates, and stay duration. Always know what is coming.

condition.title: Property Condition
condition.desc: After every checkout, your property is inspected. See the current condition status here — green means all good, flagged issues appear immediately.

actions.title: Quick Actions
actions.desc: Block dates for personal use, request a maintenance visit, or view your full financial report — all with one click from your dashboard.

demo.title: Everything you need, in one place
demo.subtitle: A complete management platform designed for international property owners. See what awaits you inside.

dashboard.title: Your property at a glance
dashboard.desc: Real-time earnings, occupancy rates, next guest information, and property condition — all in one premium dashboard. No more calling your manager for updates.
features: Quick actions: block dates, request visit, view reports

bookings.title: Full booking visibility
bookings.desc: See every reservation across all platforms — Airbnb, Booking.com, and direct. Block dates for personal use. Never be surprised by a booking again.

finance.title: Transparent finances to the cent
finance.desc: Monthly statements with itemized breakdowns. See exactly what you earned, what was charged, and what's coming. Download PDF reports in your language.

care.title: Your property, always cared for
care.desc: Track every cleaning, inspection, and maintenance visit. See reports with photos. Know the condition of your property at all times, from anywhere.

communication.title: Direct line to your team
communication.desc: Message your manager directly through the platform. No lost emails, no phone tag. Everything documented, everything transparent.

aiTools.title: 5 intelligent tools working for you
aiTools.subtitle: HostMasters is not just a management company — it's a technology platform. Our AI tools work 24/7 to maximize your revenue and protect your property.

tools.name: AI Dynamic Pricing
tools.desc: Algorithm that analyzes 7 factors — seasonality, events, competition, demand, lead time, ratings and occupancy — to set the optimal price for every single night.

tools.name: AI Team Assistant
tools.desc: Intelligent chat assistant available in every portal. Ask about your earnings, next bookings, property status or any question — get instant answers based on your real data.

tools.name: AI Monitor
tools.desc: Autonomous system that runs 9 daily checks on every reservation, payout and task. Detects anomalies before they become problems — missed check-ins, overdue payouts, inactive properties.

tools.name: Market Intelligence
tools.desc: Weekly scraping of Airbnb and Booking.com in the Costa Tropical region. Real competitor data: prices, ratings, occupancy. Interactive map with zone analysis and market positioning.

tools.name: Client Pricing Analytics
tools.desc: Your property's pricing performance over time. Seasonal trends, average rates, occupancy patterns. Compare your prices against the market and identify optimization opportunities.

hero.subtitle: You bought on the Costa Tropical to invest — not to worry about cleanings, difficult guests or misaligned prices. HostMasters handles everything with real data, AI pricing and total transparency.

problem.title: Being a remote owner shouldn't be this hard

items.title: Random pricing
items.desc: Without market data, pricing is guesswork. You lose revenue in peaks and can't attract in low seasons.

items.title: Zero visibility
items.desc: You don't know what's happening at your property until you get a complaint or a surprise bill.

items.title: Slow communication
items.desc: Lost emails, photos that never arrive, reports that only come when you insist.

items.title: Opaque commissions
items.desc: You don't know how much is left for you. Hidden costs eat your profitability without warning.

solution.title: Management with intelligence, not guesswork
solution.subtitle: Three pillars that make HostMasters different from any traditional property manager.

items.title: AI Dynamic Pricing
items.desc: Algorithm that analyzes seasonality, local events, competition and real-time demand to set the optimal price for each night.
items.highlight: Up to +25% revenue vs. fixed pricing

items.title: Your own data, not estimates
items.desc: Dashboard with real data from your bookings, revenue and costs. Detailed monthly reports to the cent — no surprises.

items.title: Market Intelligence
items.desc: Access to Costa Tropical market data: occupancy rates by zone, average prices, demand trends and benchmarks.

social.title: A platform built for the future

items.quote: The short-term rental market on the Costa Tropical is growing fast, but most management is still done manually. A platform that combines AI pricing with real data has enormous potential to professionalize the sector.
items.name: Industry Analysis

items.quote: Property owners investing in southern Spain need transparency and technology. The gap between what traditional managers offer and what technology enables is exactly where innovation happens.
items.name: Market Outlook

items.quote: The combination of dynamic pricing algorithms, real-time market data and transparent owner portals represents the next generation of property management — one that benefits both owners and guests.
items.name: Technology Perspective

plans.title: Choose the level of service you need
plans.subtitle: All plans include full management. The more you invest, the lower the commission and the more intelligent tools you get.

finalCta.subtitle: Start with the Premium plan for 1 month at no cost. See the difference that real data and AI pricing make to your revenue.
finalCta.disclaimer: No commitment · No credit card · Cancel anytime
